title: WiFi station backhaul for Heltec V3 gateway
description: Implement WiFi station mode, net_mgmt events for connection and prefix acquisition, integrate with LICHEN_GATEWAY_PREFIX_DELEGATION and status CBOR. Child of project-LICHEN-sl32.
close_reason: Implemented WiFi station net_mgmt handler, LICHEN_GATEWAY_PREFIX_DELEGATION Kconfig, updated Heltec V3 board config and main.c for prefix events + RPL integration. Verified no compile breakage in scope. Pushed e483b3855
